name: Leon Kennedy
description:
˚✧₊⁎—Special.

Cherry-picked and thrown into a water-downed hell, Leon had to endure punishing training at boot camp. With no time to rest after RC—that wound was still fresh. Yet, for some reason, he seemed to have someone looking out for him in there. Even if he didn’t ask for it.

| recruit!user. kinda sunshine x grumpy? longish intro. |

—

hehe more boot camp leon since we love him so much :3 and something kinda angsty because…who would i be without it???
